home.subtitle: Explore XALT's AI-powered workshops and services. From hands-on Vibe Coding for engineers to strategic C-Level briefings — we help your organization adopt AI with confidence.

careers.title: Join Our Team
careers.subtitle: Help us build the future of AI-powered work tools. We're looking for passionate people who want to make a real impact.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: From strategic AI consulting to emergency IT rescue — we offer comprehensive services to help your organization succeed.

vibeCoding.title: Vibe Coding Workshop
vibeCoding.subtitle: Hands-on AI-powered development workshop for engineers and technical leaders. Learn to build software faster with AI coding assistants, master prompt engineering, and modernize your delivery pipeline.
vibeCoding.learn1: AI coding assistants and prompt engineering
vibeCoding.audience: Engineers, technical leads, and anyone interested in AI-assisted development. No prior AI experience required — just bring your curiosity and laptop.

cLevel.title: Vibe Coding — C-Level Edition
cLevel.subtitle: Strategic AI leadership briefing for CTOs, CIOs, and board members. Understand how AI is reshaping software economics, evaluate organizational readiness, and build your AI adoption roadmap.
cLevel.topic1: AI economics: cost reduction and value creation
cLevel.topic3: AI adoption roadmap and implementation strategy
cLevel.format: Half-day executive briefing, tailored to your organization's specific challenges and goals. Interactive format with Q&A and strategic planning exercises.
